title: Mobile Suica service restored after a failure that prevented recharging
summary: The mobile payment app Mobile Suica and PASMO suffered an interruption that prevented recharging balance, buying passes, and other services, but the problem was resolved after several hours.

title: Father arrested for murder of mother and daughter in Nagano
summary: A man was arrested on suspicion of murdering his wife and daughter, and injuring his son with a knife in the city of Tōmi, Nagano.

title: Several people sickened by spray in Nagoya post office
summary: A spray, possibly bear repellent, was accidentally discharged at a post office in Nagoya, causing several people to feel ill and be taken to the hospital.

title: Japan's Tankan index for large manufacturers improves for fifth consecutive quarter
summary: The Bank of Japan reported that business sentiment among large manufacturers improved for the fifth consecutive period, driven by demand for semiconductors and AI.

title: Yen weakens to 162 yen per dollar on expectations of US rate hike
summary: The yen exchange rate reached levels of 162 yen per dollar, pressured by the perception of an aggressive stance by the Federal Reserve and the strength of the dollar.

title: Sota Fujii retains Kisei title for seventh consecutive year
summary: Shogi player Sota Fujii defeated Shinichiro Hattori to secure his seventh consecutive victory in the Kisei title, extending his winning streak in official matches.

title: Mount Fuji climbing season begins with new control measures
summary: The climbing season on Mount Fuji began with the opening of two routes, including the implementation of payment kiosks to manage visitor flow and reduce congestion.

title: Sexual harassment victims call for prevention to be a central issue in Tagawa municipal election
summary: Women who suffered sexual harassment by the mayor of Tagawa submitted a document requesting that harassment prevention become a key point in the election campaign.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi travels to India to strengthen economic security cooperation
summary: The Japanese prime minister makes his first official visit to India, seeking to deepen bilateral cooperation in economic security and counterbalance Chinese influence.

title: Progress in reform of the Imperial Household Law to allow dynastic continuity
summary: The government and parliament are advancing discussions on reforming the Imperial Household Law, considering options such as allowing women of the imperial family to remain in the family or adopting males from collateral branches.

title: Land prices in Japan rise for fifth consecutive year, led by tourist and redevelopment areas
summary: Land values showed an increase of 2.9%, with significant rises in popular tourist destinations and urban renewal areas, while all 47 prefectural capitals recorded increases or stability.

title: Canada joins as observer in next-generation fighter jet development between Japan, UK, and Italy
summary: Canada will participate as an observer in the joint development program for the next-generation fighter jet, while the project also addresses budget delays in the UK.

title: Chubu Electric manipulated data at Hamaoka nuclear plant even after being flagged by regulator
summary: It was revealed that multiple departments of Chubu Electric were involved in manipulating inspection data at the Hamaoka nuclear plant, and that the company continued the irregularities even after warnings from the regulatory authority.

title: Nikkei 225 rises for third consecutive day, closes above 70,000 points
summary: The Nikkei index on the Tokyo Stock Exchange advanced 412 points to 70,474 yen, driven by buying of semiconductor-related stocks and other sectors, though initial gains were reduced due to profit-taking.

title: LDP and Ishin adjust parliamentary agenda and advance agreement on social security reform
summary: The Liberal Democratic Party and the Japan Innovation Party agreed on a memorandum to normalize parliamentary debate, including a timeline for increasing the medical co-payment for the elderly.

title: Average gasoline price in Japan holds steady at 169.8 yen per liter
summary: The retail price of gasoline remained unchanged from the previous week, thanks to government subsidies that keep the cost below 170 yen.

title: Japanese national football team members reflect on World Cup and look to the future
summary: Players of the Japanese national team, including Takefusa Kubo and Ao Tanaka, made statements after the World Cup, expressing their desire to improve for 2027 and lamenting missed opportunities.

title: US Supreme Court declares Trump's revision of birthright citizenship unconstitutional
summary: The highest US court ruled against President Trump's attempt to modify birthright citizenship, finding it violates the Constitution, a setback for his immigration policy.

title: Xi Jinping calls reunification with Taiwan a 'historical mission' on Communist Party anniversary
summary: On the occasion of the 105th anniversary of the Chinese Communist Party, President Xi reiterated his commitment to the reunification of Taiwan, calling it an unavoidable historical task.

title: 10-year-old disabled child leaves school during class, found dead at waterfall
summary: A student from a special needs school in Kyoto prefecture disappeared after asking to go to the bathroom during class, and was found dead at a waterfall 1.5 kilometers away.
